CVE-2017-18188.title: OpenRC opentmpfiles through 0.1.3, when the fs.protected_hardlink ...
CVE-2017-18188.description: OpenRC opentmpfiles through 0.1.3, when the fs.protected_hardlinks sysctl is turned off, allows local users to obtain ownership of arbitrary files by creating a hard link inside a directory on which "chown -R" will be run.

CVE-2017-18925.title: opentmpfiles through 0.3.1 allows local users to take ownership o ...
CVE-2017-18925.description: opentmpfiles through 0.3.1 allows local users to take ownership of arbitrary files because d entries are mishandled and allow a symlink attack.
